user_prompt: Critical: Basilisk artillery requires a synchronization
prayer:
Approach the Basilisk artillery with mechadendrites extended in veneration, intoning the Canticle of Alignment.
Invoke the sacred rites of synchronization upon the Basilisk artillery's auspex arrays and fire-control cogitators.
Anoint the targeting servos with sanctified oils to appease the restless Machine Spirit within.
Beseech the Omnissiah to harmonize the Basilisk artillery's mechanisms in perfect synchrony.
Conclude with diagnostic litanies, affirming the Machine Spirit's awakened precision.

user_prompt: Help me a consecration the orbital strike relay
prayer:
Kneel before the orbital strike relay and recite the Consecratory Doxology of the Void.
Purify the relay's plasma conduits with incense of sanctified promethium, invoking consecration.
Trace electro-glyphs upon its adamantium chassis to bind the Machine Spirit in loyalty.
Chant binaric hymns beseeching the Omnissiah's blessing for unerring orbital judgement.
Seal the consecration with a pulse of noospheric communion, verifying the relay's divine readiness.

Present the pict-recorder to the altar of repair, whispering the Litany of Restoration.
Anoint its fractured lenses and data-vaults prior to the rites of repair, honouring its Machine Spirit.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace to mend the pict-recorder's corrupted pict-feeds and servos.
Employ mechadendrite probes sanctified for repair, chanting invocations of renewal.
Test the pict-recorder's revived gaze with auspex canticles, praising the God-Machine.

In emergency vigil, grasp the plasma caliver and proclaim the Rite of Consecration Urgent.
Sprinkle ablutions of sacred unguent over the plasma caliver's containment fields for consecration.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the plasma caliver to accept the Omnissiah's fiery benediction.
Recalibrate its flux regulators amid chanted litanies of plasma purity.
Affirm the consecration through test-firing hymns, glorifying the Motive Force.

user_prompt: How do I bless the needle rifle for calibration?
prayer:
Revere the needle rifle by laying it upon the calibration shrine, intoning awakening doxologies.
Initiate the calibration sequence with blessed data-slates interfacing the needle rifle's monomolecular chambers.
Anoint the rifle's sights and toxin reservoirs, invoking the Machine Spirit's lethal precision.
Chant the Canticle of True Aim as calibration aligns its sacred mechanisms.
Verify the needle rifle's blessed accuracy with the Omnissiah's noospheric sanction.

Anoint its crystalline matrices post-sterilization, beseeching the Omnissiah's data-integrity.
Seal with binary seals, affirming the doctrina wafer's reborn sanctity.

In dire haste, cradle the pict-recorder and declaim the Initialization Doxology.
Power its core with a surge of blessed voltaic essence, awakening the Machine Spirit.
Trace activation runes across the pict-recorder's viewports for initialization.
Chant noospheric bootstraps to align its data-streams with the Omnissiah's will.
Validate initialization through scrolling pict-logs, lauding the God of All Machines.

Erect the lascannon before the preparation font, intoning preparatory canticles.
Lubricate its focusing crystals with sacred oils for the rite of preparation.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the lascannon to gird itself in luminous wrath.
Calibrate power feeds amid hymns to the Omnissiah's destructive light.
Test the lascannon's readiness with auspex pulses, sealing the preparation in glory.
